name: ai-medical-interpreter
description: AI Medical Report Interpreter - Your 24/7 Virtual Doctor

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --success=first -n web,api -c blue,green "npm -w @ami/web run dev" "npm -w @ami/api run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w @ami/shared run build && npm -w @ami/api run build && npm -w @ami/web run build
